## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] Ruff passes
- [ ] Mypy passes
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or machine-specific paths are included
- [ ] Every commit includes a DCO sign-off (`Signed-off-by:`)

## Compatibility and data impact

Describe API, event, migration, projection, replay, or benchmark effects. Write `None` when not applicable.
